title: National Wildlife Week Act
description: National Wildlife Week Act (National Wildlife Week Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Wildlife Week Act .

provisions.title: National Wildlife Week
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada in each year, the week in which April 10 occurs, being the anniversary of the birthday of the late Jack Miner, shall be known and observed as National Wildlife Week, so that interested clubs, associations and organizations may, on the day of that week most suitable to them, disseminate information pertinent to wildlife conservation.
